title: Documentation & Release-Metadata Correction (0.16.0)
description: Bring agent-bober's user-facing documentation and release metadata back in sync with the shipped codebase. Documents the lens panels, workflow engine, multi-provider (DeepSeek/claude-code), graph telemetry, and auto-filter command features; cuts a dated CHANGELOG [0.16.0]; fixes the README command table and package.json metadata; and tags the untagged releases 0.12.0-0.16.0.

clarificationQuestions.question: How should the CHANGELOG frame the post-v0.15.0 work?
clarificationQuestions.recommendation: A (keep [Unreleased]) is lowest-risk, but user chose B.

clarificationQuestions.question: Where should already-released-but-undocumented features (auto-filter, shipped ~0.12.0) be recorded?

options.label: B
options.description: All in the new release block

clarificationQuestions.question: Where should the missing 0.12.0-0.15.0 git tags point?
Which docs beyond README/CHANGELOG/package.json should be corrected?

resolvedClarifications.answer: Cut a dated [0.16.0] entry (2026-06-04) and bump package.json 0.15.0 -> 0.16.0 to keep version and changelog in sync. Empty [Unreleased] header retained above it.
All newly-documented items land in [0.16.0]; auto-filter annotated inline as shipped in 0.12.0. No backfill into historical [0.12.0].

Tags point at the actual version-bump commits: v0.12.0->e30099f, v0.13.0->0ffc81e, v0.14.0->b83d641, v0.15.0->95f9965; v0.16.0 tags the doc-release commit. Annotated tags, created locally, NOT pushed.
Correct COMMANDS.md, docs/providers.md, and VISION.md in addition to README/CHANGELOG/package.json.

assumptions: Cut a dated [0.16.0] section and bump package.json 0.15.0 -> 0.16.0 (user Q1). Verified current version is 0.15.0 (package.json:4).
All newly-documented items land in [0.16.0]; auto-filter annotated as shipped 0.12.0 (user Q2).

Workflow engine IS documented: pipeline.engine ('ts'|'skill'|'workflow', default 'ts') is committed on main at src/config/schema.ts:204 (last touched by PR #27/#25). The earlier 'unmerged' audit finding was incorrect.

Lens panels are real on main: evaluator.panel and architect.panel = { enabled:false, lenses:[], maxConcurrent:4 } at src/config/schema.ts:112 and :123; built-in evaluator lenses [correctness, security, regression, quality] and arch lenses [scalability, security, cost, operability, maintainability, reversibility].
Tags point at actual release commits (user Q3); created locally with annotated tags; NOT pushed without separate confirmation.

Doc edits committed on a new branch bober/docs-correction-0.16.0, staging ONLY the 6 doc files, because the working tree has substantial unrelated changes (graph CLI, agent files) that must not be swept in.
PR-link org/repo is BOBER3r/agent-bober (matches existing CHANGELOG links).
The 0.13.0 CHANGELOG date (2026-05-24) vs bump-commit date (2026-05-25, 0ffc81e) discrepancy is left as-is; not rewriting history.
docs/providers.md is already complete/accurate for DeepSeek + claude-code; lens panels are not a provider concern, so providers.md gets verification only (no forced edits).
COMMANDS.md is the CLI reference (not the slash-command catalog); its real gap is a missing DEEPSEEK_API_KEY env-var row, which is the accurate correction there.
outOfScope: Pushing commits or tags to the remote (separate explicit confirmation required).
Any source-code changes (docs, metadata, and git tags only).
Rewriting existing historical CHANGELOG entries beyond appending the new [0.16.0] block.
Altering skill references/*.md or agents/*.md (already in sync with the shipped features).

features.title: CHANGELOG [0.16.0] + npm metadata
features.description: Cut a dated [0.16.0] CHANGELOG entry covering all features shipped after 0.15.0 plus the previously-undocumented auto-filter feature, and update package.json release metadata.
acceptanceCriteria: AC1: CHANGELOG.md contains a '## [0.16.0] — 2026-06-04' header between an empty '## [Unreleased]' and '## [0.15.0]', matching the existing em-dash header format.

AC2: The [0.16.0] entry documents (with PR links) the claude-code provider, DeepSeek provider, graph telemetry + update-all, evaluator lens panel, architect lens panel, native lens panel, config-selectable workflow engine, and auto-filter command filtering; plus a ### Fixed entry for the plugin PostToolUse hooks schema.
AC4: package.json description mentions DeepSeek and Claude Code; keywords array contains 'deepseek'.
AC5: package.json and CHANGELOG.md remain valid (JSON parses; changelog markdown well-formed).

features.title: README corrections
features.description: Document lens panels and the workflow engine in the README, expand the slash-command table to all 24 commands, and document the auto-filter command-filtering behavior.
acceptanceCriteria: AC1: README has a Lens Panels section explaining opt-in evaluator.panel and architect.panel (off by default), listing the built-in lenses for each.
AC2: The Full Configuration Reference jsonc block documents evaluator.panel, an architect.panel section, and pipeline.engine.

AC3: The Slash Commands table lists all 24 installed commands (the 12 currently present plus bober-code-review, bober-debug, bober-deploy, bober-diagnose, bober-graph, bober-impact, bober-incident, bober-onboard, bober-postmortem, bober-runbook, bober-using-bober, bober-verify).
AC4: The README documents preset-aware (auto-filter) slash-command installation.

features.title: Ancillary docs (COMMANDS.md, VISION.md, docs/providers.md)
features.description: Add the DeepSeek env var to the CLI reference, extend the VISION config reference with the panel and engine fields, and verify the provider guide.
acceptanceCriteria: AC1: COMMANDS.md Environment Variables table includes a DEEPSEEK_API_KEY row.
AC2: VISION.md Configuration Reference documents pipeline.engine, evaluator.panel, and architect.panel.
AC3: docs/providers.md is verified accurate for DeepSeek + claude-code (no inaccurate or missing provider content).

features.title: Git release tags 0.12.0-0.16.0
features.description: Commit the doc changes on a feature branch and create the missing annotated release tags pointing at the correct commits.
acceptanceCriteria: AC1: The 6 doc files are committed on branch bober/docs-correction-0.16.0 (only those files staged).
AC2: Annotated tags v0.12.0 (e30099f), v0.13.0 (0ffc81e), v0.14.0 (b83d641), v0.15.0 (95f9965) exist and point at those commits.
AC3: Annotated tag v0.16.0 exists and points at the doc-release commit.
AC4: No tags are pushed to the remote (git tag exists locally; git ls-remote --tags shows they are not yet pushed).

nonFunctionalRequirements.requirement: Documentation must match the actual shipped code on main (no documenting unmerged features, no inaccurate config keys).
nonFunctionalRequirements.verificationMethod: Cross-check every documented config key against src/config/schema.ts and every documented command against .claude/commands/.

nonFunctionalRequirements.requirement: New CHANGELOG/README content matches existing formatting conventions (em-dash headers, bold lead-in bullets, PR-link form).
nonFunctionalRequirements.verificationMethod: Visual diff against existing [0.15.0] entry and Supported Providers table.

techNotes.dataModel: N/A — documentation and git metadata only.
securityConsiderations: No secrets added; DEEPSEEK_API_KEY documented as an env var only, never a literal.
techNotes.existingPatterns: CHANGELOG: '## [X.Y.Z] — YYYY-MM-DD' em-dash headers, '### Added/Fixed' subsections, '- **Lead-in** ([#N](url)): ...' bullets. README config reference is a jsonc block. VISION config reference uses '| Field | Type | Default | Since | Description |' tables.

metadata.riskNotes: Documentation + git tags only; no code logic. Main risk is sweeping unrelated working-tree changes into the doc commit (mitigated by selective staging) and documenting features that differ from main (mitigated by schema cross-checks).

abandonedReason: Superseded 2026-07-14: written for 0.16.0, but repo is now 0.18.0 (tags through v0.18.0). Re-scoped into a fresh 0.18.0 docs/metadata refresh spec at user request.
